data.body: DONE (commit 45c4ae4). 13 schemas authored (common.schema.json shared $defs + 12 per-shape, ticket_state refactored to $ref common); registry-backed validator() resolves cross-file refs; OUTPUT_SCHEMAS map added. Conformance test test_schema_outputs.py validates every shape's REAL output (lib+CLI). 10 stable read MCP tools now typed (outputSchema); mismatch D (edit ticket_type) + E (typed set_file_impact/set_verify_commands inputSchema) fixed. Lifecycle/gate typing deferred to T3/T4 (shapes change there). BUG1/BUG2 already fixed by native-reads migration (regression cover in test_ready_output.py/test_cli.py). Full suite 1291 passed, 2 xfailed.
